libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: No Docker image, environment variable, or system property is indicated. Meaningful coverage should instantiate JacksonModule, register it with SchemaGeneratorConfigBuilder/SchemaGenerator, and generate schema for local fixture classes using Jackson annotations such as @JsonProperty, @JsonPropertyDescription, @JsonIgnore, @JsonPropertyOrder, @JsonSubTypes/@JsonTypeInfo, or @JsonUnwrapped.

deterministic_setup.reason: jsonschema-module-jackson is used by registering JacksonModule with SchemaGeneratorConfigBuilder; the module artifact declares jsonschema-generator as provided and the project documentation recommends using the same version for the generator and module.

risks: If the Forge scaffold already injects provided dependencies for this artifact, the extra generator dependency may be redundant but should be version-aligned.
Coverage can be superficial if tests only instantiate JacksonModule; tests should assert schema changes caused by Jackson annotations.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: The requested artifact is a Jackson module for victools jsonschema-generator, not a standalone generator. Its POM declares com.github.victools:jsonschema-generator as provided, so a normal scaffold that depends only on jsonschema-module-jackson will not have the generator API needed for meaningful usage.
